title: Mantisalca duriaei
taxonomy: Mantisalca duriaei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the subtribe Centauroideae, which includes several other species of plants. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in dry, sandy areas. The classification of Mantisalca duriaei is further detailed within the tribe Cardueae, a group of plants characterized by their thistle-like appearance. Its classification is also recognized within the order Asterales, a group of flowering plants that includes many other species of thistles and asters.
